Step.name: # (comment)
Step.Text: ARCHIVY SYNC VORGAENGE PDF PUSH (Container) - Leitfaden-konform mit FM.SQL.Field fuer echte Container-Base64daten.

Step.name: If
Step.Calculation: IsEmpty ( $key ) or IsEmpty ( $base_url ) or IsEmpty ( $$FM_VORGAENGE_TABELLE ) or IsEmpty ( $$FM_VERTRAEGE_TABELLE )

Value.Calculation: MBS("Msgbox"; "Archivy Sync abgebrochen" & Char(182) & "Bitte zuerst FM_ARCHIVY_SYNC_INIT ausfuehren und $$FM_VORGAENGE_TABELLE / $$FM_VERTRAEGE_TABELLE setzen.")

MBS("FM.SQL.Execute"; ""; "SELECT \"Vertrag_ID\" as \"vertrag_id\", \"Vertragseigentümer\" as \"owner\" FROM \"" & $$FM_VERTRAEGE_TABELLE & "\" WHERE \"Archivy_sync\" = 'x' OR \"Archivy_sync\" = 'X'")

If ( Left ( $json_marked ; 1 ) = "[" and PatternCount ( $json_marked ; "Syntax error" ) = 0 and PatternCount ( $json_marked ; "Line 1, Column" ) = 0 ; ValueCount ( JSONListKeys ( $json_marked ; "" ) ) ; 0 )

If ( Left ( $json_contracts ; 1 ) = "[" and PatternCount ( $json_contracts ; "Syntax error" ) = 0 and PatternCount ( $json_contracts ; "Line 1, Column" ) = 0 ; ValueCount ( JSONListKeys ( $json_contracts ; "" ) ) ; 0 )
Case ( not IsEmpty ( $mk ) and not IsEmpty ( $mk_owner ) ; List ( $owner_map ; $mk & "|" & $mk_owner ) ; $owner_map )
Case ( not IsEmpty ( $mk_name ) and not IsEmpty ( $mk_owner ) ; List ( $owner_map ; $mk_name & "|" & $mk_owner ) ; $owner_map )
$fehler & "Keine markierten Vertraege mit Archivy_sync = x gefunden." & Char(182)
If ( Left ( $sql ; 5 ) = "[MBS]" ; $fehler & "SQL Fehler bei Datenselektion: " & Left ( $sql ; 220 ) & Char(182) ; $fehler )

Case ( $vertrag_owner_http = 200 and Left ( TrimAll ( GetAsText ( $vertrag_owner_resp ) ; 1 ; 1 ) ; 1 ) = "[" ; Let([ _r = Lower ( TrimAll ( GetAsText ( JSONGetElement ( $vertrag_owner_resp ; "[0].vertragsbesitzer_id" ) ) ; 1 ; 1 ) ) ] ; Case ( Left ( _r ; 1 ) = "*" or Left ( _r ; 1 ) = "?" or _r = "null" ; "" ; _r ) ) ; "" )

Case ( $vertrag_owner_http = 200 and Left ( TrimAll ( GetAsText ( $vertrag_owner_resp ) ; 1 ; 1 ) ; 1 ) = "[" ; Let([ _r = Lower ( TrimAll ( GetAsText ( JSONGetElement ( $vertrag_owner_resp ; "[0].vertragsbesitzer_id" ) ) ; 1 ; 1 ) ) ] ; Case ( Left ( _r ; 1 ) = "*" or Left ( _r ; 1 ) = "?" or _r = "null" ; "" ; _r ) ) ; "" )

Step.name: If
Step.Calculation: $vertrag_key = $caid or ( not IsEmpty ( $caname ) and $vertrag_key = $caname ) or ( Filter ( $vertrag_key ; "0123456789" ) = $vertrag_key and Filter ( $caid ; "0123456789" ) = $caid and GetAsNumber ( $vertrag_key ) = GetAsNumber ( $caid ) ) or ( Filter ( TrimAll ( GetAsText ( $vertrag_raw ) ; 1 ; 1 ) ; "0123456789" ) = TrimAll ( GetAsText ( $vertrag_raw ) ; 1 ; 1 ) and Filter ( $caid ; "0123456789" ) = $caid and GetAsNumber ( TrimAll ( GetAsText ( $vertrag_raw ) ; 1 ; 1 ) ) = GetAsNumber ( $caid ) )

Value.Calculation: Case ( not IsEmpty ( TrimAll ( GetAsText ( MBS("FM.SQL.Field"; $sql_contracts; $caidx; 2 ) ) ; 1 ; 1 ) ) ; Lower ( Substitute ( TrimAll ( GetAsText ( MBS("FM.SQL.Field"; $sql_contracts; $caidx; 2 ) ) ; 1 ; 1 ) ; "+" ; "-" ; " " ; "-" ; "&" ; "-" ; "/" ; "-" ; "_" ; "-" ) ) ; Lower ( Substitute ( TrimAll ( GetAsText ( MBS("FM.SQL.Field"; $sql_contracts; $caidx; 2 ) ) ; 1 ; 1 ) ; "+" ; "-" ; " " ; "-" ; "&" ; "-" ; "/" ; "-" ; "_" ; "-" ) ) )

Case ( $vertrag_rest_http = 200 and Left ( TrimAll ( GetAsText ( $vertrag_rest_resp ) ; 1 ; 1 ) ; 1 ) = "[" ; Lower ( TrimAll ( GetAsText ( JSONGetElement ( $vertrag_rest_resp ; "[0].vertragsbesitzer_id" ) ) ; 1 ; 1 ) ) ; $vertrag_rest_http = 200 and Left ( TrimAll ( GetAsText ( $vertrag_rest_resp ) ; 1 ; 1 ) ; 1 ) = "{" ; Lower ( TrimAll ( GetAsText ( JSONGetElement ( $vertrag_rest_resp ; "vertragsbesitzer_id" ) ) ; 1 ; 1 ) ) ; "" )

Let([ v = $vertrag_key ; map = "¶" & $owner_map ; p = Position ( map ; "¶" & v & "|" ; 1 ; 1 ) ] ; Case ( p > 0 ; Let([ s = p + 1 + Length ( v ) + 1 ; e = Position ( map & "¶" ; "¶" ; s ; 1 ) ] ; Middle ( map ; s ; e - s ) ) ; "" ) )

Case ( $idx = 0 ; "map=" & Left ( Substitute ( $owner_map ; ¶ ; " / " ) ; 120 ) & " | fm=" & $owner_from_contract & " | sbv=" & $owner_from_vertrag_api & " | sbk=" & $vertrag_owner_key & " | all=" & $owner_from_contracts_all & " | fmsql=" & $owner_lookup_dbg & " | db=" & $owner_from_db & " | marked=" & $owner_from_marked & " | row=" & $owner_for_row & " | vertrag=" & $vertrag_raw ; $owner_diag )
Case ( IsEmpty ( $owner_for_row ) ; $fehler & "Vorgang " & $vorgang_id & ": OWNER_MISSING fuer Vertrag " & $vertrag_raw & Char(182) ; $fehler )
$fehler & "Vorgang " & $vorgang_id & ": Container liefert kein PDF-Base64 (Prefix=" & Left ( $datei_payload ; 12 ) & ")." & Char(182)

Step.name: If
Step.Calculation: PatternCount ( Lower ( MBS("CURL.GetResultAsText"; $c; "UTF-8") ) ; "unauthorized" ) > 0 or PatternCount ( Lower ( MBS("CURL.GetResultAsText"; $c; "UTF-8") ) ; "row-level security policy" ) > 0

Value.Calculation: $fehler & "Vorgang " & $vorgang_id & " PDF HTTP " & $http & ": Storage Unauthorized (RLS). In FM_ARCHIVY_SYNC_INIT $$SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY (service_role) setzen." & Char(182)

"Archivy Sync: Vorgaenge PDF Push" & Char(182) & "Verarbeitet: " & If ( IsEmpty ( $anzahl ) ; 0 ; $anzahl ) & Char(182) & "PDF hochgeladen: " & $ok & Char(182) & "Uebersprungen: " & $skip & Char(182) & If ( IsEmpty ( $fehler ) ; "Keine Fehler." ; "Fehler:" & Char(182) & Left ( $fehler ; 1000 ) ) & Char(182) & "BUILD: 05-2026-06-27.37-supabase-rest" & Case ( not IsEmpty ( $owner_diag ) ; Char(182) & "DEBUG: " & $owner_diag ; "" ) & Case ( not IsEmpty ( $marked_diag ) ; Char(182) & "MARKED: " & $marked_diag ; "" ) & Case ( not IsEmpty ( $contract_dbg ) ; Char(182) & "CONTRACTS: " & $contract_dbg ; "" )
